text.title: Team RFC Process for Devs Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Team RFC Process for Devs output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: PR implements decision with no RFC reference

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: rfc_id populated with a typed value
status populated with a typed value
sections populated with a typed value
review_sla_days populated with a typed value
decider populated with a typed value
rejected_archive_path populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
